scripts.contracts:test:trace: npm exec -w apps/contracts -- hardhat test --network hardhatMainnet --show-stack-traces --verbosity 3
scripts.contracts:test:fulltrace: npm exec -w apps/contracts -- hardhat test --network hardhatMainnet --show-stack-traces --verbosity 4 --gas-stats
scripts.contracts:node: npm exec -w apps/contracts -- hardhat node --network hardhatMainnet
scripts.contracts:deploy:local: npm exec -w apps/contracts -- hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network hardhatMainnet
scripts.contracts:deploy:sepolia: npm exec -w apps/contracts -- hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network sepolia
scripts.contracts:simulate:quick: npm exec -w apps/contracts -- ts-node scripts/simulator/runSimulator.ts normal 12345 --deploy --steps 5
